title: paroxuno #3947
definition:
1) to make sharp, sharpen
    1a) to stimulate, spur on, urge
    1b) to irritate, provoke, arouse to anger
        1b1) to scorn, despise
        1b2) provoke, make angry
        1b3) to exasperate, to burn with anger
